title: Carpet Sky Additionals
description: Adding Additional Additions to Carpet Sky Additions
body:
# Carpet Sky Additionals
## What is Carpet Sky Additionals?
Carpet Sky Additionals (CSA) is an addon for [Carpet Sky Additions ](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet-sky-additions) that makes the mod more suitable for multiplayer. By default, Carpet Sky Additions has all players in the same world, but thousands of blocks away from each other. This presents difficulties when wanting to interact with other players, but also wanting privacy. How do we combat this? Well by making each SkyBlock its own 3 dimensions of course!

## How can the mod be configured?
- Carpet commands can be accessed by `/carpet <command>` 
  - `sneakingGrowsPlants` : Classic SkyBlock spam crouching to grow all types of plants
  - `sneakGrowingProbability` : 1/n chance that a random block will be grown when crouching
  - `sneakGrowingRadius` : The radius in which the game will select a random block 
- CSA's command can be accessed by `/islands`
  - `Create An Island` : Creates 3 new dimensions for your new SkyBlock
  - `Delete An Island` : Deletes the specified SkyBlock
  - `Rename An Island` : **Currently is not implemented**
  - `Manage Your Islands` : Allows you to manage SkyBlock join invites
  - `Join An Island` : Sends a Join Request to the owner of the SkyBlock
  - `Leave An Island` : Removes you from the specified SkyBlock
  - `Visit An Island` : Allows you to spectate any SkyBlock
  - `Go To Your Island` : Teleports you to one of your SkyBlocks
  - `Go To The Hub` : Teleports you to the main Overworld
- CSA's admin command can be accessed by `/islands-admin`
  - Select the SkyBlock you want to manage

## Additional Notes
- As of right now, `Go To The Hub` will take the player to `8, 64, 9` in the Overworld
